---
title: "Notebooks"
subtitle: This section contains the my notebooks related to statistics, machine learning, and clincial trials. 
page-layout: article
anchor-sections: false
---

::: {#books-links .column-screen-inset-right style="max-width: 850px;"}
## Statistics

### Survival Analysis

-   [Survival Analysis - Techniques for Censored and Truncated Data](survival%20analysis/Survival%20Analysis%20-%20Techniques%20for%20Censored%20and%20Truncated%20Data.qmd)

## Biostatistics

### Clinical Trial 

- [Notebook of Clinial Trial Designs](clinical%20trial%20design/clinical-trial-design.qmd)

### Hypothesis Testing

- [Notebook of Hypothesis Testing](hypothesis%20testing/hypothesis-testing.qmd)

:::
